faqs.question: Can I use AI to handle turning process documents into internal training slides without losing the core detail?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you choose the tool that matches the input type and then review the output yourself. Gamma is the best starting point, Canva Magic Studio is the strongest second choice, and Notion AI is the safer fallback when you need a different balance of speed and control.

faqs.question: Which AI tool is better when I need source checking?
faqs.answer: Canva Magic Studio is usually the better choice when source checking matters, while Gamma is stronger when the job starts with a known set of files or notes.

faqs.question: Is Gamma better than Canva Magic Studio for this workflow?
faqs.answer: Gamma is better when you want the most direct match for the main input; Canva Magic Studio is better when the workflow changes enough to justify a different tool.

faqs.question: What should I avoid before I share the result?
faqs.answer: Avoid sharing the first draft until you have checked facts, tone, and any missing context. Use Notion AI as a helper, not a replacement for review.
